case_title: CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC DBA GREAT WESTERN VS. TANG SHANGXIAN et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-11-2014 AT 10:30 AM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
